default_creds.context: initial credentials — forced password change on first login

misconfig_patterns: Default neo4j:neo4j credentials before password change
Vector index (Neo4j 5.13+) detectable via SHOW INDEXES (partial — may need auth)

active_probe.false_positive_check: response JSON must include neo4j_version field — uniquely identifies Neo4j HTTP API

deployment_tells: GET :7474/ returns JSON with neo4j_version and neo4j_edition
Bolt wire at :7687 — try neo4j:neo4j before password change
pivot_paths: SHOW INDEXES YIELD * WHERE type='VECTOR' → confirm AI workload (if auth off)
Bolt :7687 → neo4j:neo4j → MATCH (n) RETURN n LIMIT 5
sources: [CONFIRMED — NuClide Cat-02 survey 2026-06-05; live population observed]
